prose.en: Require the developer of the system, system component, or system service to enable integrity verification of software and firmware components.

guidance.en: Software and firmware integrity verification allows organizations to detect unauthorized changes to software and firmware components using developer-provided tools, techniques, and mechanisms. The integrity checking mechanisms can also address counterfeiting of software and firmware components. Organizations verify the integrity of software and firmware components, for example, through secure one-way hashes provided by developers. Delivered software and firmware components also include any updates to such components.

prose.en: the developer of the system, system component, or system service is required to enable integrity verification of software and firmware components.

objects.en: procedures addressing system developer configuration management
acquisition contracts for the system, system component, or system service
software and firmware integrity verification records
Organizational personnel with system and service acquisition responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
organizational personnel with configuration management responsibilities
organizational personnel with supply chain risk management responsibilities
Organizational processes for monitoring developer configuration management
mechanisms supporting and/or implementing the monitoring of developer configuration management
